text.title: Architect PR Review Checklist Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the architect-pr-review-checklist methodology end-to-end.

step.name: classify
step.action: Decide: architectural / non-architectural. Skip-If applies if non-architectural.
step.decision-gate: If non-architectural, emit skip-record and STOP.

step.name: section-walk
step.action: Walk the six sections in order; flag any 'violation' or 'unknown'.

step.name: verdict
step.action: ship = all ok; block = any violation; escalate = any unknown.

step.name: write-report
step.action: Fill templates/pr-review-report.md; cite ADR ids in adr_conformance section.

step.name: time-check
step.action: Record time_spent_minutes; if > 15, attach escalation note (split PR or pair-review).
step.decision-gate: If > 60, mark escalate verdict regardless of section statuses.
